name: Keychron Q1 HE Base Kit
description: Premium 75% layout wireless magnetic hall-effect keyboard barebone. Full CNC machined aluminum body, gasket mount design, and hot-swappable.

reviews.comment: Outstanding build quality! The hall-effect switches are a game-changer.
Heavy, solid aluminum body. Wireless connection is ultra-stable.

name: Wooting 60HE+ Module
description: The ultimate 60% analog gaming keyboard base. Powered by hall-effect Lekker switches, offering customizable actuation and rapid trigger.

reviews.comment: Rapid trigger is pure cheat code in Valorant. Highly recommend!
Software is web-based and excellent. Box sounds hollow though, needs foam.

name: GMMK Pro 75% Barebone
description: An ultra-premium gasket-mounted mechanical keyboard base. Features a signature side lightbar, rotary encoder dial, and 5-pin hotswap.

reviews.comment: Very nice knob control and side-glow, but the stabilizers needed relubing.
Looks premium on my desk. Forest green is gorgeous.

name: Gateron Magnetic Jade Switches
description: Magnetic linear switches with a unique short-key-travel sound. Very smooth, pre-lubed from factory, with excellent RGB diffusion.

reviews.comment: The clack sound is incredible. No scratchiness at all.

name: Cherry MX Black Clear-Top (Nixie)
description: Premium linear switches paying homage to the legendary 'Nixie' switches. Heavy actuation, deep sounding, and extremely durable.

reviews.comment: Super smooth when lubed with 205g0. Feels like butter.

name: NovelKeys Cream Switches
description: Linear switches made of self-lubricating POM material. They get smoother and sound deeper the more you type on them.

reviews.comment: Require a break-in period, but once broken in, they feel magnificent.

name: GMK Botanical keycaps (PBT Double-shot)
description: Beautiful forest-inspired keycaps. Crisp legends, premium matte PBT material, and rich green-white-gray colors.

reviews.comment: Color matching is perfect. No warping on spacebar.

name: Drop MT3 Cyberpunk Keycap Set
description: High-profile sculpted ABS keycaps featuring glowing neon yellow, pink, and purple legends on deep purple-gray keycaps.

reviews.comment: MT3 profile is so comfortable! The deep dish cradles your fingers.

name: Custom Coiled Aviator Cable
description: Double-sleeved paracord cable wrapped in techflex with a detachable heavy-duty GX16 4-pin aviator connector.

reviews.comment: Matches my setup perfectly. The coils are perfectly tight.

name: Premium Keyboard Tuning & Lube Kit
description: Complete kit containing Krytox 205g0 grease, Krytox 105 oil, switch opener, brush, keycap puller, and stem holder.

reviews.comment: Has everything you need to tune switches and stabilizers. High quality oil.
